audit_items.proof_trace: decode_url() returns std::string by value (via std::stringstream::str()), not a pointer — the C++ type system guarantees the return value is never NULL and no pointer dereference occurs. The sole external caller (http_rpc_request.cc:254) assigns the result directly to a std::string member with no pointer involved. The property assertion is based on an incorrect assumption about the return type.
